Employee.title: Employee
Employee.description: An employee record in the organization ledger

id.description: The unique employee ID (e.g. EMP-001 or EMP_TEMP_006)

monthlySalary.description: Monthly base salary of the employee

workingDays.description: Designated working days in the month

fullDaysAbsent.description: Number of full days employee was absent

absentHours.description: Number of partial hours employee was absent

absentMinutes.description: Number of partial minutes employee was absent

notes.description: Array of string log messages or annotations

documents.description: Array of uploaded documents with name, size, date details

PunchLog.title: Punch Log
PunchLog.description: A collection of check-in and check-out events for an employee on a single day

id.description: Date of punch log in YYYY-MM-DD format

date.description: Date of the punch log in YYYY-MM-DD format

punches.description: Array of strings representing up to 8 max IN-OUT log events (e.g. 08:00 IN)

CustomUser.title: Custom User
CustomUser.description: Credentials and authorization settings for observers and custom managers.

password.description: Associated password credential if fallback is utilized

createdAt.description: Creation timestamp in ISO-8601 string structure

GatePass.title: Gate Pass
GatePass.description: Gate pass record to track employee out and in times

date.description: The date for which the gate pass was issued

inTime.description: The return time of the employee

remarks.description: Optional details or reasons for the gate pass

OvertimeLog.title: Overtime Log
OvertimeLog.description: Overtime record to track employee arrival, exit, shift pattern, and remarks

arrTime.description: The check-in/arrival time of the overtime

outTime.description: The check-out/exit time of the overtime

shiftPattern.description: The overtime shift mode (e.g. Triple Shift, Regular OT, Night OT)

remarks.description: Optional details or reasons for the overtime

empShift.description: Copy of the employee shift designation

empShiftTime.description: Copy of the employee shift hours value

ShiftRules.title: Shift Rules
ShiftRules.description: Parameters and parameters for shift reconstruction and filtering rules

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.description: Global rules, configurations, and variables for biometric connection and reporting

LoomOrder.title: PP Fabric Loom Order
LoomOrder.description: An order produced at the PP fabric Loom plant

id.description: Unique record id of the loom order

rows.description: Multiple product specification rows mapped to this order

CanteenFoodBill.title: Canteen Food Bill
CanteenFoodBill.description: Daily food bill entry logged by HR as a challan

challanNo.description: The unique or physical challan number

issuedBy.description: The person who issued the challan

mealType.description: Whether the challan was for lunch or dinner

amount.description: Auto-calculated cost of food based on noOfMeals * 55

monthYear.description: Year-Month key, e.g. 2026-06, for quick monthly querying

/settings/{settingsId}.description: System settings and rules engine database document configurations

/employees/{employeeId}.description: Rosters and employee records inside the Firestore ledger

/employees/{employeeId}/punches/{date}.description: Daily biometric punch IN-OUT logs array for the employee

/custom_users/{email}.description: Approved and registered observer custom emails database for portal access

/gatePasses/{passId}.description: Employee gate pass records for exit and return tracking logged by HR

/overtimeLogs/{logId}.description: Employee overtime logs including shift pattern and arrival/exit bounds

/loomOrders/{orderId}.description: PP Fabric Loom plant production scheduling orders

/canteenFoodBills/{billId}.description: Challan-based daily logged food bills for canteen lunches and dinners
